overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia exploring a medieval castle fortress at night. The character traverses torchlit interior corridors, exits to coastal terraces overlooking the ocean, walks along cliffside paths, and reaches a panoramic viewpoint overlooking a distant village.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle interior corridor with wooden paneling

events.description: passes a seated guard holding a torch on the right wall
approaches arched doorway leading to exterior terrace

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through torchlit corridors, examining the ornate wooden architecture

notable_agents.action: guard sitting against the wall holding a lit torch

entered.detail: wide stone staircase with ornate wooden railings at the start of the corridor
tall wooden pillars with decorative paneling lining both sides of the corridor
polished stone tile flooring reflecting torchlight
wall-mounted iron sconces with burning flames providing warm illumination
high vaulted stone ceiling with wooden beams
large circular brazier with flames in the middle of the corridor ahead
dark wood paneled walls with decorative trim
stone archway leading to the exterior, visible at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through an enclosed castle corridor with ornate wooden pillars and paneling. The space is illuminated by warm torchlight from wall sconces. He passes a seated guard on the right and approaches a circular fire pit before reaching the arched exit doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone terrace balcony overlooking the ocean

events.description: exits the interior corridor onto an open stone terrace with ocean view
lighting shifts from warm torchlight to cool blue moonlight

agents.ego_description: stepping out of the castle interior onto the exterior terrace, continuing forward toward the ocean overlook

entered.detail: low stone walls marking the edge of the terrace balcony
large square stone brazier with bright flames on the terrace corner
dark blue ocean visible beyond the terrace railing under night sky
the stone archway exit now behind the character

segments.scene_description: The character exits the warm interior onto a stone terrace balcony exposed to the night air. A large torch brazier burns on the right, illuminating the stone railing and the dark ocean beyond. The lighting shifts dramatically from warm orange to cool blue moonlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliffside path beside the castle walls

events.description: approaches stone stairs leading back up toward the castle

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow coastal path with the ocean on the left and castle walls on the right

entered.detail: narrow dirt and grass path winding along the cliff edge
tall stone fortress wall rising on the right side of the path
dark water visible below the cliff edge to the left
patches of grass and small plants growing along the path edges
stone staircase ascending back up to the castle entrance

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a narrow dirt path at the base of the castle walls, with the ocean visible to the left and rough stone walls to the right. Sparse grass grows along the path edges. The character approaches a stone staircase leading back up into the fortress.

events.description: ascends stairs and re-enters the covered interior of the castle
returns to warm torchlight illumination after the cool exterior

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone stairs and walking through the upper castle corridors

entered.detail: steep stone stairs with worn steps ascending between stone walls
rough-hewn stone block walls of the stairwell
wooden handrail along the left side of the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a steep stone staircase back into the castle interior, transitioning from the cool outdoor moonlight back to warm torchlit corridors. Wooden handrails line the stairs as the character climbs between rough stone walls.

events.description: reaches the open viewpoint with panoramic view of the village below
stops at the cliff edge to observe the distant village

agents.ego_description: walking to the cliff edge and stopping to overlook the distant village and coastline

entered.detail: large rocky cliff edge providing a vantage point
coastal village with multiple lit windows visible in the valley below
castle fortification walls and towers on the right

segments.scene_description: Geralt emerges onto a rocky cliffside viewpoint overlooking a vast coastal landscape. The distant village glows with warm lights against the dark blue night, while castle ramparts stand to the right. The character stops at the cliff edge to observe the panoramic scenery.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the warm, enclosed interiors of a castle to the cool, open expanse of a moonlit coastline. It begins within an ornate corridor of wooden pillars and paneling, moving past a seated guard and a circular fire pit toward an arched exit. As the character steps through the doorway, the scene shifts dramatically from orange torchlight to deep blue moonlight upon a stone terrace balcony overlooking the dark ocean. The camera then descends from the balcony to a narrow dirt path at the base of the fortress walls, where sparse grass lines the way between the rough stone masonry and the sea. Finally, the movement follows the path forward before turning toward a stone staircase that leads back up into the fortress.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the enclosed, torchlit depths of a castle interior to a wide, moonlit coastal vista. It begins as the character ascends a steep stone staircase, moving between rough walls and wooden handrails while the lighting shifts from cool moonlight to the warm glow of interior torches. As the climb concludes, the camera follows the character out of the fortress and onto a rocky cliffside viewpoint. The scene then expands to reveal a vast coastal landscape under a dark blue night sky, with the castle ramparts receding to the right. Finally, the camera comes to a halt at the cliff's edge, overlooking a distant village glowing with warm lights against the horizon.
